hero.subtitle: We offer you three private villas nestled in the enchanting forests of Pamporovo. A cozy, home-like atmosphere in the mountains, all year round.

location.title: Just a stone's throw from everything, yet far from the noise
location.subtitle: Pamporovo Resort, Raykovski Livadi area — nestled in the pine forest
location.info: Pamporovo is the sunniest mountain resort in Bulgaria—at 1,650 m in the heart of the Rhodopes. Winter brings 37 km of perfectly groomed slopes and night skiing, while summer offers nature trails, waterfalls, and healing fresh air. And our villas are your peaceful retreat in the midst of it all.

widgets.galleryVillaTabs: Selecting a villa from the gallery

about.title: Your home high in the Rhodopes
about.subtitle: Three villas, one goal—to make you feel right at home
about.intro: We’re glad you’ve found us. We offer three detached villas nestled in the pine forest of Raykovski Livadi—where the noise of the city remains far away, and the day begins with birdsong and the scent of pine resin.
about.details: Villa 1, Villa 2 and Villa Deluxe are furnished just as we would like our own mountain home to look—with real wood, soft textiles, and those little details that make a place feel warm. Here, you’re not just guests; make yourself at home.
about.hosts: As your hosts, we’re just a stone’s throw away. We help plan surprises and celebrations, point you toward the best slopes and trails, and recommend great places to eat—and if you need anything, just give us a call. We have one goal: for you to leave wanting to come back.
about.layout: Each villa is on two levels and features two bedrooms, two bathrooms, a fully equipped kitchen with a dining area, and a large living room with a wood-burning fireplace. Outside, you’ll find a terrace with panoramic views of the Rhodope Mountains and a veranda with a barbecue—the perfect spot for the best evenings.
about.imageForestAlt: A villa in the pine forest at Raykovski Livadi
about.imageInteriorAlt: Interior with a stone wall and wood
